mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ESS_FILE ( FILE_NO, APPLY_NO, APPLY_TYPE, FILE_URL, FILE_NAME, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ACTIVITY, CPNY_ID ) VALUES ( ESS_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_NO, APPLY_NO, APPLY_TYPE, FILE_URL, FILE_NAME FROM ESS_FILE WHERE FILE_NO = #{fileNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ACTIVITY = 1
SELECT FILE_NO, APPLY_NO, APPLY_TYPE, FILE_URL, FILE_NAME FROM ESS_FILE WHERE APPLY_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY CREATE_DATE
